creator: lars@eggert.org
text:
There seem to be issues when building world with clang 3.5 with -DWITH_OFED:

--- contrib/ofed.all__D ---
/usr/home/elars/src/contrib/ofed/usr.bin/opensm/../../management/opensm/opensm/osm_ucast_ftree.c:2996:8: error: taking the absolute value of unsigned type 'unsigned int' has no effect [-Werror,-Wabsolute-value]
                       if (abs(p_sw->rank - p_remote_sw->rank) != 1) {
